morning.title: Supabase doubles valuation to $10B in 8 months
morning.summary: Supabase has doubled its valuation to $10B in just 8 months, indicating significant growth in the database and backend-as-a-service market.

morning.title: IBM CEO says there is 'no way' spending on AI data centers will pay off
morning.summary: IBM's CEO has expressed skepticism about the financial returns on spending for AI data centers, suggesting that the costs may outweigh the benefits.

morning.title: Redis 8.8: New array data structure, rate limiter, performance improvements
morning.summary: Redis has released version 8.8, which includes new features such as an array data structure, rate limiter, and performance improvements to enhance its functionality and efficiency.

morning.title: Cooldown Support for Ruby Bundler
morning.summary: The Ruby Bundler now supports a cooldown feature, which allows new gems to be vetted before they are widely adopted, enhancing the security and stability of the Ruby ecosystem.

morning.title: pg_durable: Microsoft open sources in-database durable execution
morning.summary: Microsoft has open-sourced pg_durable, a PostgreSQL extension for in-database durable execution, which enables more reliable and efficient transaction processing.

gym.title: AI Engineer Melbourne 2026 Keynote Livestream | Day 2
gym.summary: The AI Engineer Melbourne 2026 keynote livestream explores the latest advancements and trends in AI engineering, featuring expert talks and discussions.

gym.title: The AI jobpocalypse isn't real
gym.summary: This podcast episode discusses the potential impact of AI on the job market, arguing that the feared 'jobpocalypse' is unlikely to occur.

gym.title: AI still needs humans
gym.summary: This podcast episode highlights the importance of human involvement in AI development and application, emphasizing that AI is not a replacement for human intelligence and judgment.

gym.title: Jeff Kinney | Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Partypooper
gym.summary: Author Jeff Kinney talks about his experiences and insights into writing and creativity, sharing lessons learned from his popular 'Diary of a Wimpy Kid' series.

gym.title: The Power of Real Optimism
gym.summary: Dr. Deepika Chopra discusses the importance of realistic optimism in achieving success and well-being, providing practical advice on cultivating a positive and resilient mindset.

gym.title: Beyond Components: Designing Generative UI for MCP Apps
gym.summary: This video explores the concept of generative UI design for MCP apps, discussing the potential benefits and challenges of using AI-generated user interfaces.
